---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Request

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

**Who would benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] Go developers using PostgreSQL
- [ ] API developers
- [ ] Database administrators
- [ ] DevOps engineers

**What is the expected usage pattern?**
Describe how this feature would be used in practice.

## Implementation

**API Design (if applicable)**
```go
// Example Go API you'd like to see
type NewService interface {
    NewMethod(ctx context.Context, params Params) (Result, error)
}
```

**Database Impact**
- [ ] Will require schema changes
- [ ] Will affect query performance
- [ ] Will add new database dependencies
- [ ] No database impact

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

**Would you be willing to contribute this feature?**
- [ ] Yes, I can work on this
- [ ] Yes, but I need guidance
- [ ] No, but I can test it
- [ ] No, I just want to request it
